zh.lifeSummary: Frances Townsend於1824年出生在美國南卡羅來納州。她於大約1845年與James P. Massey在美國南卡羅來納州安德森結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她於1860年住在美國喬治亞哈特哈特韋爾且於1870年住在美國喬治亞哈特迪斯特利可特 1。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Frances Townsend于1824年出生在美国南卡罗来纳州。她于大约1845年与James P. Massey在美国南卡罗来纳州安德森结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她于1860年住在美国乔治亚州哈特哈特韋爾且于1870年住在美国乔治亚州哈特迪斯特利可特 1。

nameMeanings.name: Townsend
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived at the extremity of a village, from Middle English toun(es)ende. Compare Town . There may have been some confusion with Townson .

variants.name: Town
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Kent): topographic name from Middle English toun(e), t(h)one, tun(e) ‘town, village, settlement’ (Old English tūn), often in the senses ‘primary settlement within an area’, ‘manor, estate’, and ‘hamlet, farm’, for someone who lived in such a place.

variants.name: Townzen
meanings: English: probably an altered form of   Townsend  .

nameMeanings.name: Frances
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of   Francis .  In the 16th century the two spellings were used indiscriminately for both sexes, the distinction in spelling not being established until the 17th century.

historicEvents.title: The Crimes Act
historicEvents.description: The Crimes Act was made to provide a clearer punishment of certain crimes against the United States. Part of it includes: Changing the maximum sentence of imprisonment to be increased from seven to ten years and changing the maximum fine from $5,000 to $10,000.

historicEvents.title: Fort Sumter Constructed
historicEvents.description: In 1829 Fort Sumter is constructed in the Charleston Harbor, South Carolina. Fort Sumter is most known for being the site of the first shots of the Civil War. It is barely ready when the American Civil War starts.
In 1860, South Carolina quit the United States because its citizens were in favor of slavery and President Lincoln was not. The Civil War started a year later.
Abraham Lincoln issues Emancipation Proclamation, declaring slaves in Confederate states to be free.

historicEvents.title: The Last Public Hanging in Georgia
historicEvents.description: The last public hanging in Georgia was on September 28, 1893. The General Assembly prohibited public executions in December 1893. Prior to this law, Georgians commonly traveled to witness scheduled public executions.

historicEvents.title: The First woman elected into the US Congress
historicEvents.description: Jeannette Pickering Rankin became the first woman to hold a federal office position in the House of Representatives, and remains the only woman elected to Congress by Montana.
historicEvents.urlTitle: The First woman elected into the US Congress

historicEvents.title: Anthony Crawford Lynched
historicEvents.description: South Carolina native, father to 13 children, and a local farmer, Anthony Crawford, is lynched on October 21, 1916, in Abbeyville, South Carolina. The lynching is followed after Crawford has an arguement with a white storekeeper.

en.lifeSummary: Frances Townsend was born in 1824, in South Carolina, United States. She married James P. Massey about 1845, in Anderson, South Carolina, United States. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She lived in Hartwell, Hart, Georgia, United States in 1860 and District 1116, Hart, Georgia, United States in 1870.

fr.lifeSummary: Frances Townsend est née en 1824, à Caroline du Sud, États-Unis. Elle a épousé James P. Massey environ 1845, à Anderson, Caroline du Sud, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle a vécu à Hartwell, Hart, Géorgie, États-Unis en 1860 et à District 1116, Hart, Géorgie, États-Unis en 1870.

de.lifeSummary: Frances Townsend wurde 1824 in South Carolina, Vereinigte Staaten geboren. Sie hat um 1845 in Anderson, South Carolina, Vereinigte Staaten James P. Massey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1860 hat sie in Hartwell, Hart, Georgia, Vereinigte Staaten und 1870 in District 1116, Hart, Georgia, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt.

ja.lifeSummary: Frances Townsendは1824年にアメリカ合衆国サウスカロライナ州で生まれた。約1845年にアメリカ合衆国サウスカロライナ州アンダーソンでJames P. Masseyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1860年にはアメリカ合衆国ジョージア州ハートハートウエルに，1870年にはアメリカ合衆国ジョージア州ハートディストリクト 1に住んでいた。

ko.lifeSummary: Frances Townsend(은)는 1824년 미국 사우스캐롤라이나 주에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1845년 미국 사우스캐롤라이나 주 앤더슨에서 James P. Massey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1860년도에 미국 조지아 주 하트 하트웰에서, 1870년도에 미국 조지아 주 하트 디스트릭트 1에서 살았다.

ru.lifeSummary: Frances Townsend родилась в 1824 г. в местности Южная Каролина, Соединенные штаты. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James P. Massey около 1845 г. в местности андирсон, Южная Каролина, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она жила в местности хартвелл, харт, Джорджия, Соединенные штаты в 1860 году и в местности дистрикт 1, харт, Джорджия, Соединенные штаты в 1870 году.
